what_it_does: A self-contained design-system preview card rendering form-input components: a focused text field with inline URL-preview helper, a search input with embedded magnifier, gold checkboxes (on/off), and a textarea.
observations: Carries the @dsCard metadata comment (group Brand, name 'Inputs & checkboxes', viewport 700x280).
Two-column grid of .field blocks (label + input + help text).
Inputs use --bg-surface, --border-default, --r-md; .focus state sets --accent-gold border + a 3px --accent-gold-soft ring.
Search input embeds an inline data-URI SVG magnifier (stroke colour hardcoded as %23A89678) positioned left.
Checkboxes are CSS-only: a gold .box with a ::after rotated-border checkmark; .off swaps to --accent-gold-soft and hides the check.
Help text uses --font-mono; the URL-preview helper bolds a sample conceptv.io panotours URL.
Textarea reuses .input styling with inline resize:none/height overrides.
standouts: The pure-CSS checkmark (rotated border on ::after) avoids any icon dependency.
Inline URL-preview helper ties an input field to a concrete product URL pattern.
conventions: Follows token references for colours, borders, radii.
Breaks token discipline with the hardcoded SVG stroke colour (%23A89678) inside the data-URI search icon.
Uses inline style overrides on the textarea and some help spans.
concerns: The search-icon stroke colour is a hardcoded hex inside the data-URI rather than a token reference.
notes: A form-controls preview: focused text field, search-with-icon, CSS-only gold checkboxes, and textarea — token-driven except the inline SVG icon colour.
questions: Can the data-URI SVG icon colour be sourced from a token, or is hardcoding unavoidable inside a CSS url()?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — declares an inputs & checkboxes preview and renders exactly those controls.
intention_signals: To show the consistent input border/focus treatment across single-line, search, multi-line, and checkbox controls so the form vocabulary reads as one family.
novelty: The CSS-only rotated-border checkmark and the inline product-URL preview helper bound to a field.
contribution: Contributes the form-control styling vocabulary (input/search/checkbox/textarea, focus ring, gold check) expressed against the token system.
summary_for_embedding: A token-driven HTML preview card rendering form inputs: focused text field with URL helper, search input with embedded SVG magnifier, CSS-only gold checkboxes, and a textarea.
intention_for_embedding: To present the design system's consistent form-control and focus vocabulary for visual review in the gallery.
